system.description: Keys are tuned to locks that cannot be picked by normal means, or bypassed without whisper expertise. Their access point is in the Ghost Field until the key is present.
system.additional_info:
Are these locks modern scientific triumphs, or old arcane defenses? Does the key look like a key, or does it look like a missing decoration, or a gem? Is the key physical, or energy, like living blood of the right family?

Dangers:
• The locks are hidden and trapped. Messing with the lock could hollow the intruder (tearing the spirit out of the body) or other unpleasantness.
• The precise location of the lock must be known, and it is not near what it is locking.

Remedies:
• The ghostport lock has been a fad several times in Duskvol. Each time, there was some mass production, and a key to a similar lock might work with a little help.
• The owner may have stiffed a whisper locksmith on the fee, or otherwise offended the expert, who is knowledgeable and disgruntled.
